text:
Miha Clan (, Miha-zoku) is a clan with a special greeting. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 1 

Overview

The Miha Clan is a clan whose greeting is putting their butts together. 

Plot

Kurapika's Memories

Kurapika mentions the Aiboni Clan and the Miha Clan during one of the written tests he takes to gain approval to venture out into the outside world. 

Trivia

Miscellaneous

The word "Miha" can be split into two parts: "Mi", a kanji letter meaning "to see". And "Ha", a kanji letter meaning "to stretch". But other kanji combinations are possible.

References
